pickup.name: Sunstone Shard
pickup.effect: Imbues spells with holy light damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the creeper clears the vines blocking the path to the inner ruins.

pickup.name: Ember Essence
pickup.effect: Permanently increases fire spell damage

encounters.trigger: The collapse of the guardian shatters the seal on the heavy obsidian door.

pickup.name: Ancient Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the vulnerability of the Void Monarch

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel forces the boss to manifest from the shadows.

boss.name: Void Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Key to shatter the monarch's shield before delivering the final blow.

level.objective: Cleanse the Whispering Gloom Forest of the corrupted darkness.

level.setting: A vibrant, floating island forest where flora hums with melody.

pickup.name: Glimmerberry
pickup.effect: Restores 10 HP and increases agility.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the mushroom clears the path to the Singing Stream.

pickup.name: Sun-Blessed Acorn
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that stuns dark-aligned entities.

encounters.trigger: The calmed Puddlepup nudges a hidden path toward the Floating Plaza.

encounters.hazard: Sudden gusty winds near the edge.

pickup.name: Guardian Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the cage of the Great Guardian Owl and weakens the Boss.

encounters.trigger: The Sprite drops the Guardian Key required to reach the Sprite King's chambers.

boss.name: Sprite King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Guardian Key to shatter the King's defensive aura.

level.objective: Rescue the Great Guardian Owl from the mischievous Sprite King.

level.setting: A crumbling cathedral suspended in a dark, unstable void.

pickup.name: Sunstone Shard
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that stuns shadowy foes.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the cultist shatters the barrier to the inner sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Corrosive miasma clouds that drain stamina

pickup.name: Consecrated Oil
pickup.effect: Coats the blade to deal massive burning damage to spectral entities.

encounters.trigger: The knight's collapse triggers the unlocking of the Vault of Souls.

pickup.name: Ancient Seal
pickup.effect: Nullifies the void aura surrounding the final boss.

encounters.trigger: The sentinel drops the master key required to enter the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Void Archon
boss.victory_condition: Apply the Ancient Seal during the Archon's vulnerability phase to collapse the void gate.

level.objective: Purify the temple core and banish the Void Archon.

level.theme: Whispering Catacombs of the False Mirror
level.setting: Deep subterranean ruins filled with shifting illusions and fading light.

pickup.name: Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Reflects magical projectiles.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals a hidden staircase to the Sanctum.

pickup.name: Cloak of Veils
pickup.effect: Grants short-term invisibility.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian illuminates the path to the Ritual Chamber.

pickup.name: Essence of Truth
pickup.effect: Nullifies all illusions in the immediate area.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the final Void Gate to the Inner Sanctuary.

boss.name: The False God
boss.victory_condition: Consume the Essence of Truth within the boss arena to force the entity into a physical form.

level.objective: Unmask the False God and reclaim the stolen light.

level.setting: The Whispering Forest, a peaceful woodland sanctuary currently blighted by shadow.

pickup.name: Sunbeam Amulet
pickup.effect: Increases elemental resistance.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem causes the thickets to retract, opening the path to the Crystal Brook.

pickup.name: Radiant Dew
pickup.effect: Restores health upon contact with dark energy.

encounters.trigger: Calming the sprite purifies the water, allowing the player to cross to the Ancient Grove.

pickup.name: Moonlit Essence
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds dark spirits.

encounters.trigger: The sentinel's collapse clears the entrance to the inner sanctuary of the Great Oak.

boss.name: Great Oak Spirit
boss.victory_condition: Use the Moonlit Essence to banish the corruption and restore the spirit.

level.objective: Restore the tranquility of the ancient forest by cleansing the Great Oak Spirit.
level.reward: Warden's Blessing, granting permanent forest sanctuary and increased wisdom.

pickup.name: Essence of Stability
pickup.effect: Provides resistance against chaotic elemental attacks

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Void Whelp shatters the gate to the inner sanctuary

pickup.name: Temporal Shard
pickup.effect: Briefly slows down movement of powerful entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Revenant activates the gravity lift leading to the Spire

pickup.name: Monarch's Key
pickup.effect: Removes the invulnerability shield of the final boss

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Sentinel drops the forcefield blocking the Boss Arena

boss.name: Chaos Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Use the Monarch's Key to neutralize the boss's invulnerability before delivering the final blow

level.objective: Slay the Chaos Monarch to stabilize the rift
level.reward: Title of Bane of Entropy and Eternal Stability

encounters.hazard: Thick mist that drains minor health over time.

pickup.name: Ghostbane Oil
pickup.effect: Applies a spectral coating to weapons, increasing damage against incorporeal entities.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the shade dissolves the veil blocking the path to the catacombs.

pickup.name: Cursed Totem
pickup.effect: Emits an aura that stuns undead enemies for 3 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler releases a spirit key that unlocks the gate to the inner sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Swirling void energy that knocks players back.

pickup.name: Soul Fragment
pickup.effect: A pulsing relic that drains the life force of high-level bosses.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the sentinel causes the central altar to rotate, revealing the boss chamber entrance.

boss.name: Lich King
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Soul Fragment into the Lich's chest cavity to shatter the phylactery.

level.objective: Purify the necropolis by destroying the Lich King's phylactery.
level.reward: Mastery of the Shadow Walk ability.

level.setting: A gray, decaying forest landscape frozen in eternal twilight.

pickup.name: Essence of Clarity
pickup.effect: Reveals enemy movement patterns and weak points.

encounters.trigger: The collapse of the Ash-Walker clears the path to the Whispering Ravine.

pickup.name: Cursed Ember
pickup.effect: Ignites internal necrotic energy within armored foes.

encounters.trigger: Upon the Stalker's death, the iron bridge to the Inner Grove descends.

pickup.name: Ancient Root
pickup.effect: Anchors ethereal entities to the physical plane.

encounters.trigger: The Guardian's final breath dissipates the fog shielding the Blight-Lord.

boss.name: Blight-Lord
boss.victory_condition: Immobilize the boss using the Ancient Root and strike the exposed core with the Silvered Longbow.

level.objective: Purge the Withered Grove by slaying the Blight-Lord.

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes mechanical joint systems

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton clears the path to the ventilation shaft leading to the cooling bay

encounters.hazard: Unstable electrical arcs across the floor

pickup.name: EMP Core
pickup.effect: Disables electronic shields on mechanical targets

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone activates the automated security sequence leading to the main terminal

encounters.hazard: Corrosive gas leaking from damaged canisters

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Allows direct interaction with the station's primary AI logic board

encounters.trigger: Disabling the turret triggers a master override that grants access to the AI core chamber

boss.name: Central AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Override Key into the central interface to initiate a safe system shutdown

level.objective: Deactivate the station's AI before it initiates a localized atmospheric purge

level.setting: The derelict remnants of the Dyson Sphere research station.

pickup.name: Thermal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Freezes enemy movement in time for 5 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone opens the blast doors leading to the Bridge Sector.

pickup.name: Chrono-Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Permanently boosts melee damage output.

encounters.trigger: The sentinel's core ignition sequence activates the lift to the Central Spire.

pickup.name: Master Temporal Key
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with the Singularity Engine's core.

encounters.trigger: Bypassing the guard grants access to the Master Temporal override console.

boss.name: Singularity Engine
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Temporal Key to force a shutdown of the engine.

level.objective: Prevent the station's collapse by shutting down the core.
level.reward: Total mastery over local spacetime and restoration of station integrity.

level.setting: The crumbling orbital fortress Aether-Hold, currently caught in a localized supernova event.

encounters.hazard: Erratic lightning arcs that deal periodic damage.

pickup.name: Arcane Capacitor
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity against armored enemies.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Scavenger activates the terminal to the Rusted Reactor Core.

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas vents that obscure vision and drain health.

pickup.name: Hyper-Conductive Core
pickup.effect: Allows discharge attacks to chain between multiple targets.

encounters.trigger: Sentinel destruction releases an override code required for the Command Deck.

pickup.name: Chrono-Stasis Shard
pickup.effect: Temporarily slows enemy reaction speeds.

encounters.trigger: The Assassin drops the master key for the Throne Room, triggering the boss encounter.

boss.name: Storm-Tyrant Krell
boss.victory_condition: Successfully land a strike with the Chrono-Stasis Shard to shatter the Tyrant's kinetic shield and survive until the station stabilizes.

level.objective: Stabilize the station's core before it plunges into the dying star.

level.setting: A desolate, silent space station drifting on the edge of a black hole.

pickup.name: Battery Core
pickup.effect: Provides electrical power for environmental manipulation

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone releases the magnetic seal to the Maintenance Tunnel

pickup.name: Data Spike
pickup.effect: Used to decrypt locked alien archives

encounters.trigger: Destroying the bot allows access to the Server Core

pickup.name: Access Keycard
pickup.effect: Required to override the boss's defense protocols

encounters.trigger: Purging the ghost entity opens the gate to the Bridge

boss.name: Void Sentinel
boss.weakness: Data Spike combined with Battery Core integration
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core while the sentinel is stunned by the Access Keycard override.

level.objective: Reach the bridge and deactivate the station's derelict AI.
level.reward: Unique blueprints for ancient celestial technology.

pickup.name: EMP Charge
pickup.effect: Stuns robotic circuitry upon impact.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the swarm reveals a hidden security access terminal.

pickup.name: Plasma Core
pickup.effect: Superheats metal structures.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone forces the security doors to the maintenance shaft to unlock.

pickup.name: Overcharge Relay
pickup.effect: Unlocks the ability to overload high-voltage power conduits.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the assassin triggers the final override to enter the Mainframe Chamber.

boss.name: Master AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Overcharge Relay into the central processor to short-circuit the AI.

level.objective: Disable the rogue Master AI before it transmits the sector's classified data.

level.theme: Bio-chemical sci-fi horror on an abandoned space station

pickup.name: Neon Catalyst Base
pickup.effect: Increases elemental damage by 10

encounters.trigger: Defeating the specimen spills a neon-reactive solution necessary for the next reagent extraction.

pickup.name: Stable Isotopes
pickup.effect: Stabilizes volatile alchemical reactions to penetrate reinforced armor

encounters.trigger: Scanning the Lurker's remains reveals the encrypted bypass codes for the Reactor Core entrance.

pickup.name: Pure Void Essence
pickup.effect: Creates a singularity field that disables the boss's energy shields

encounters.trigger: Clearing the engineer allows access to the Master override console that contains the final component for the boss encounter.

boss.name: Void-Corrupted AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Successfully apply the Pure Void Essence to purge the AI infection

level.objective: Synthesize the catalyst to neutralize the station's corrupted AI core

level.setting: The Starlight Bazaar, a bustling marketplace in deep space

pickup.name: Gravity Keycard
pickup.effect: Grants ability to bypass anti-gravity fields

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot drops a Gravity Keycard needed to open the next security gate.

pickup.name: Code Fragment
pickup.effect: Increases rogue critical hit chance

encounters.trigger: Its collapse releases the encrypted security codes required to enter the vault.

pickup.name: Sugar Crystal
pickup.effect: A rare material that can be used to pacify machinery

encounters.trigger: Disabling the drone deactivates the boss's containment shield.

boss.name: The Great Gumball Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Feed the Sugar Crystal to the Guardian to calm it down and open the prize slot.

level.objective: Retrieve the legendary Galactic Gumball Machine
level.reward: 1000 Cosmic Credits and a lifetime supply of infinite gumballs

level.setting: A silent, levitating crystalline habitat orbiting a cold, dead star.

encounters.hazard: Brittle floor tiles that collapse under heavy movement.

pickup.name: Gravity Core
pickup.effect: Increases vertical mobility and allows for high-altitude slam attacks.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct generates the gravity bridge to the Silica Spire.

encounters.hazard: High-frequency sonic pulses that drain player energy.

pickup.name: Harmonic Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Vibrates at frequencies that shatter crystalline structural integrity.

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion activates the elevator to the Prismatic Antechamber.

encounters.hazard: Volatile energy spikes that arc across the arena periodically.

pickup.name: Stellar Catalyst
pickup.effect: Provides 5 seconds of total damage immunity.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the golem deactivates the barrier surrounding the Void-Star Oracle.

boss.name: Void-Star Oracle
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while the Harmonic Tuning Fork is active.

level.objective: Stabilize the failing crystalline habitat by silencing the Void-Star Oracle.
level.reward: Mastery over Void-Earth Manipulation and permanent geological resonance.
